files.notes: The file contains two distinct articles as indicated in the contents. The first is 'Notes from the Field' by Amy Brown Lyman which includes program schedules, European Mission reports, and various stake reports. The second is 'Guide Lessons for October' which begins with theology lessons about parables. The text appears to cut off mid-sentence in the Guide Lessons section.
